description: Analyze the appliance failure log data to identify the highest-risk usage pattern. The analysis should include failure rates by operating conditions and consistent date formatting. Export the final report to /home/ga/Documents/failure_analysis.csv.

natural_language.prompt: You have a dishwasher failure log with inconsistent date formats. Clean the dates, sort chronologically, calculate failure rates by Cycle Type, Load Size, and Water Temperature, identify the highest-risk condition, and calculate days since first failure.
